title: Hiring Store Manager at Cafe Coffee Day

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Cafe Coffee Day
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
